story_title: Iran files FIFA complaint over US World Cup travel restrictions

sources.speaker_affiliation_kind: Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Iran (FFIRI)
sources.exact_quote: "restrictions contraires au principe d'égalité des conditions pour toutes les équipes participantes"

sources.speaker_affiliation_kind: Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Iran (FFIRI)
sources.exact_quote: “Despite submitting our tournament preparation schedule well in advance, the national team has once again encountered restrictions from the organisers, disrupting the technical staff’s plans,”

sources.speaker_affiliation_kind: Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Iran (FFIRI)

sources.role_or_affiliation: Head coach, Iran national football team
sources.speaker_affiliation_kind: Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Iran (FFIRI)
Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Iran (FFIRI)
sources.exact_quote: The football federation of Iran believes that such restrictions are inconsistent with the principle of providing equal conditions for all participating teams and may negatively affect teams’ preparation processes.

sources.speaker_affiliation_kind: Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Iran (FFIRI)
sources.exact_quote: “Consequently, the federation will formally express its dissatisfaction and lodge an official complaint with FIFA through the appropriate channels.”
